title: Mon, Mar 16 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. San Francisco offers a mild 19°C with light 8.6 km/h winds, making for comfortable cycling without much wind resistance. Scattered clouds and 66% cloud cover provide filtered sun, keeping UV exposure moderate. Visibility is clear with zero rain chance, perfect for a relaxed ride this Monday afternoon and evening.

title: Fri, Mar 20 · 12:00 PM – 09:00 PM
body: Good. Expect mild 18.6°C temperatures with light 8.6 km/h winds, offering comfortable cycling without strong gusts. Broken clouds cover 52% of the sky, providing pleasant shade and excellent visibility. No rain and moderate UV make for a safe, enjoyable ride in San Francisco this Friday afternoon to evening.

title: Wed, Mar 18 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. San Francisco offers a pleasant 20.5°C with clear skies and minimal 15% cloud cover, ensuring excellent visibility for your ride. Moderate 11.6 km/h winds provide a refreshing breeze without hindering cycling. With zero rain chance and a UV index of 6, midday to evening is ideal—just remember sun protection.

title: Thu, Mar 19 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. San Francisco offers a pleasant 20°C under clear skies with zero cloud cover, ensuring excellent visibility for your ride. Light 11 km/h winds provide a mild breeze without hindering cycling comfort. UV index is high at 7, so sun protection is advised for this rain-free afternoon and evening.

title: Tue, Mar 17 · 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM
body: Good. San Francisco offers a pleasant 20°C with clear skies and minimal cloud cover, ensuring excellent visibility for your ride. Light 10.5 km/h winds provide a gentle breeze without hindering cycling comfort. UV index is high, so sunscreen is recommended for this midday to midnight window.
